description: Language-neutral conformance vectors mapping a one-shot HTTP response status to an auth outcome. 401 (Unauthorized) => 'reauth' (token missing/expired/invalid; caller should attempt refresh/re-login then retry, or prompt). 403 (Forbidden) => 'forbidden' (authenticated but not permitted; caller should surface a forbidden message, NOT a re-login loop). Any 2xx => 'ok'. Other non-2xx => 'error'.
